title: if the characters of eva were animals what would they be
display_title: if the characters of eva were animals what would they be
wikitext:
[]: if the characters of eva were animals, what would they be?             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Mar 17, 2010 5:17 pm simple enough question. here is my list. Shinji: hedgehog (of course) Asuka: snake Misato: cougar (no pun intended, really) Rei: snow wolf Gendo: donkey (pun intended) Toji: dog Hikari: cardinal that all i have off the top of my head.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Wed Mar 17, 2010 5:20 pm Gendo would be an animal with great sexual potency.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Mar 17, 2010 5:23 pm ran1 wrote: Gendo would be an animal with great sexual potency.

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Wed Mar 17, 2010 5:25 pm Gendo would be an animal with great sexual potency.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Mar 17, 2010 5:27 pm Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion wrote: A dolphin? Unit 00 would be a ferret, Unit 01 would be a grizzly bear, Unit 02 would be an orangutan, Unit 03 would be a leopard, and Jet Alone would be a Red Jaguar.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Mar 17, 2010 5:34 pm nb4 furry fanart

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Mar 17, 2010 5:36 pm NemZ wrote: nb4 furry fanart

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Wed Mar 17, 2010 5:36 pm why would you even count jet alone, it was just a filler character. FILLER CHARACTER!

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Mar 17, 2010 5:38 pm Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion wrote: Didn't get the reference, did you? And even if the guy's filler, isn't hating him just a wee but extreme?

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Wed Mar 17, 2010 5:43 pm red cougar referance

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Wed Mar 17, 2010 5:44 pm No, you aren't. And for the record, Jet Alone is based off of Jet Jaguar.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Mar 17, 2010 5:45 pm Legendary wrote: No, you aren't. And for the record, Jet Alone is based off of Jet Jaguar.

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Wed Mar 17, 2010 5:45 pm Jet Alone is based off of Jet Jaguar.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Wed Mar 17, 2010 5:48 pm I wasn't talking to you, but to SSAS. You ninja'd me.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Wed Mar 17, 2010 6:38 pm I think Gendo would be that sort of bird thing with an enormous beak that someone shoop'd a while back.

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Wed Mar 17, 2010 7:21 pm Kaji = Sexual Tyrannosaurus.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Wed Mar 17, 2010 9:15 pm I see Shinji as a rabbit; usually runs away at the slightest thing but can be surprisingly vicious if backed into a corner.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Wed Mar 17, 2010 9:25 pm I think Rei would be a snow leopard.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Wed Mar 17, 2010 9:47 pm Shinji: Earthworm. Hides from problems and is meek. Asuka: Tasmanian Devil. Self-explanatory. Rei: Giant Deep-Sea Tube Worm. Weird mysterious enigma. Misato: Garter Snake. Mates with multiple males. Ritsuko: Orangutan. Highly intelligent. Kaji: Honeybee Drone. Once its purpose is finished, it dies. Gendo: Giant Teratorn. 6 1/2-foot tall, 250-pound meat-eating bird with a 26-foot wingspan. Fuyutsuki: Galapagos Tortoise. Old and mostly silent. Toji: Chimpanzee. Often resorts to violence. Hikari: Alligator. Friendly to loved ones, but aggressive toward others. Kensuke: Aye-Aye. Reminds me of Kensuke.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Mar 18, 2010 3:02 am I could totally picture a sloth or a koala with a Gendo beard and the glasses. Somebody shoop that shit right now.
